message:
test(http2): add E2E tests for stream ID validation and SETTINGS advertisement (bd-2c9t)

- http2_server_settings_includes_max_concurrent_streams: parses
  server SETTINGS frame and verifies SETTINGS_MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS=1
- http2_app_path_rejects_even_stream_id: sends HEADERS on stream 2,
  asserts connection closed
- http2_app_path_rejects_non_increasing_stream_id: sends stream 3
  then stream 1, asserts connection closed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
